rationale.R1.4: Agent correctly identifies prior works and flags false novelty claim, but doesn't map against multiple nearest works.
rationale.R1.7: Audits citations thoroughly, flags missing key works with precision.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses uncertainties in MAE numbers and methodological details clearly.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors introduced; identifies harmful patterns in original claims.
